creator: Pascal.Stumpf@cubes.de
text:
On Thu, Jun 30, 2011 at 10:48:53PM -0500, Stephen Montgomery-Smith wrote:
> Dear Pascal,
> 
> I am going to suggest this very simple patch.  Simply replace
> spider/files/patch-ad with the attached file.
> 
> I would test it, but I find that I am so unskilled at this game,
> that I am unable to get to 51 moves.  So can you try it out?  If it
> works, I'll go ahead and commit it.
> 
> Thanks, Stephen
Yes, works for me. Thanks!

> --- globals.h.orig	1991-09-28 17:46:20.000000000 +0000
> +++ globals.h	2011-07-01 03:25:27.000000000 +0000
> @@ -96,6 +96,10 @@
>  Bool	can_get_help_files();
>  #endif
>  
> +#ifndef __FreeBSD__
>  extern char	*malloc();
>  extern char	*calloc();
>  extern char	*realloc();
> +#else
> +#include <stdlib.h>
> +#endif
